introSection: Maximus - Der Flug des Wächters is a steel winged roller coaster located at Legoland Deutschland in Günzburg, Bavaria, Germany. Opened on 25 March 2023, it was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and is a custom Wing Coaster installation.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Maximus - Der Flug des Wächters is a steel winged roller coaster located at Legoland Deutschland in Günzburg, Bavaria, Germany. Opened on 25 March 2023, it was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and is a custom Wing Coaster installation.



2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders per train.
